name: Spine MRI Post-Contrast
description: Spine MRI with gadolinium contrast for lesion evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the spine with post-contrast T1-weighted fat-saturated sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.content: No abnormal meningeal enhancement. Dura is normal.

sections.content: Vertebral bodies [show normal enhancement pattern / no abnormal enhancement to suggest metastasis or infection].
